mentions.note: Partner of Rubric for identity management; not being displaced—Rubric complements Okta in cyber resilience workflow vs. seat-based SaaS competitors.
Identity platform securing AI agents; only 7% earnings growth but CEO McKinnon's vision compelling; worth nibbling at 23x.
Market skeptical on identity management valuations; investors believe AI chatbots can replicate capabilities; sentiment-valuation mismatch.
Todd McKinnon demonstrates consistent earnings power. Buyer even below cost basis; identity access management demand persistent across cycles.
